data.content: Expanded ReTakes metadata rendering in retakes-view: supports additional step/note/handoff metadata key shapes, adds legacy notes fallback when only bead.notes exists, and broadens agent badge fields (including nested agent/user/actor shapes and optional version/timestamps). Commit 7db341c landed on main and pushed to origin/main. Gates: lint warnings-only baseline, tsc pass, unit tests pass, build still fails due pre-existing Next prerender/useContext issue unrelated to this change.
